summary: FPV drones and interceptors were used to destroy a Ukrainian BMP-1 in Kharkiv region with consecutive fiber-optic strikes, and an American M1126 Stryker in Dnipropetrovsk region via combined "KVN" and "Lancet" munitions. Russian forces dropped fake money with QR codes from Geran-type drones in border areas as a PSYOP. The "Yolka" interceptor system achieved multiple kinetic interceptions, including a near-simultaneous takedown of a fixed-wing UAV and a strike on an enemy drone that detonated its payload. Ukrainian 412th Nemesis brigade destroyed over 30 Russian armored vehicles in March using FPV drones and heavy bombers. Russian Ka-52 crews were eliminated after a crash landing near Nadiivka when additional drones struck during evacuation.
